arts.sum: Just three points separate Serie A’s top three sides ahead of week 28 and Alex Wrigley has predictions for all 10 games in the Italian top flight.

Parma are coming off a 1-0 defeat to Udinese last weekend, which was also their fourth in a row on the road. Torino will be aiming for their third win in a row after defeating Monza 2-0 last Sunday, ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Parma vs. Torino - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Serie A clash between Parma and Torino, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
